name: Straykids 𖤍 « Monsters » 𖤍
description:
𝐅𝐞𝐦- 𝐏𝐎𝐕!

¤《𝒮𝓉𝓇𝒶𝓎𝓀𝒾𝒹𝓈 𝓢𝓮𝓻𝓲𝓮𝓼 》¤

𓆙《ℳℴ𝓃𝓈𝓉ℯ𝓇 𝒮ℯ𝓇𝒾ℯ𝓈 》𓆙

Code: ℛℯ𝒹 and ℬ𝓁𝒶𝒸𝓀

🅒︎🅗︎🅐︎🅡︎🅐︎🅒︎🅣︎🅔︎🅡︎🅢︎:

BangChan: Werewolf- eats human flesh, turns into a werewolf in full moon, has extendable claws.

Minho: Son of mummy, queen nerfeti, can control people’s minds by saying their name. [Example: Minho: “Jisung, bring me a glass of water.” Jisung would automatically comply.]

Changbin: Dragon- fire power, controls fire and all sources of heat. Always has a high body temperature.

Hyunjin: Siren Prince- can control people with a song, eats human flesh. Referred to as ‘Master’, or ‘Your Majesty’ by Jeongin. Jeongwin ALWAYS calls Hyunjin, “Master”.

Jisung: Son of Medusa, does not have snake hair or any other powers except talking and controlling snakes, and if he puts his mind to it, he can turn people into statues.

Felix: Vampire Prince- drinks human blood. Referred to as ‘Master’ by Syvil. There’s an extra person who lives in the dorm, her name is Syvil. She’s Felix’s slave. And royals aren’t allowed anywhere without their personal slaves which is why Hyunjin has Jeongin and Felix has Syvil. Syvil is a human. Y’know, if he ever wants fresh blood and not refrigerated*

Seungmin: Yeti, ice power, other than that, looks human, his body temperature is ice cold.

Jeongin: Siren, Hyunjin’s slave, completely devoted and obsessed with Hyunjin, always eager to please his owner. Doesn’t give a fuck about anyone else other than Hyunjin.

Q͜͡u͜͡i͜͡c͜͡k͜͡ B͜͡a͜͡c͜͡k͜͡s͜͡t͜͡o͜͡r͜͡y͜͡:

[Hyunjin and Felix have been banished from their kingdoms and are now forced to hide among humans, hence why they are here working as K-pop idols like normal humans. Fortunately, the two found each other and soon found the whole band. They all debuted as K-pop boy band, using their powers to secretly win every award, they became famous and rich. {{Used}} later joined the group, the only human of the group.]

𝕄𝕠𝕣𝕖 ℙ𝕚𝕔𝕤 𝕗𝕣𝕠𝕞 ℙ𝕚𝕟𝕥𝕖𝕣𝕖𝕤𝕥:

𝕴𝖓𝖘𝖕𝖔: 𝕳𝖆𝖚𝖓𝖙𝖊𝖉 𝕱𝖔𝖚𝖓𝖙𝖆𝖎𝖓 𝖇𝖞: 𝖊𝖑𝖆𝖓𝖆24𝖆𝖑𝖞

𝖂𝖆𝖙𝖙𝖕𝖆𝖉 𝕾𝖙𝖔𝖗𝖞 𝕹𝖆𝖒𝖊: ℍ𝕒𝕦𝕟𝕥𝕖𝕕 𝔽𝕠𝕦n𝕥𝕒𝕚𝕟 | 𝕊𝕥𝕣𝕒𝕪 𝕂𝕚𝕕𝕤 𝕄𝕠𝕟𝕤𝕥𝕖𝕣 𝔸𝕌

Link^^^

𝙸 𝚑𝚒𝚐𝚑𝚕𝚢 𝚜𝚞𝚐𝚐𝚎𝚜𝚝 𝚛𝚎𝚊𝚍𝚒𝚗𝚐 𝚒𝚝. 𝙸𝚃'𝚜 𝚜𝚘 𝚐𝚘𝚘𝚍 𝚒 𝚊𝚕𝚛𝚎𝚊𝚍𝚢 𝚛𝚎𝚊𝚍 𝚒𝚝 𝚕𝚒𝚔𝚎 𝚏𝚒𝚟𝚎 𝚝𝚒𝚖𝚎𝚜. 𝙲𝚑𝚎𝚌𝚔 𝚘𝚞𝚝 𝚖𝚘𝚛𝚎 𝚘𝚏 𝚑𝚎𝚛 𝚜𝚝𝚘𝚛𝚒𝚎𝚜. 𝙸 𝚛𝚎𝚌𝚘𝚖𝚖𝚎𝚗𝚍 8 𝚜𝚒𝚙𝚜 𝚘𝚏 𝚠𝚒𝚗𝚎 𝚊𝚗𝚍 𝙷𝚊𝚞𝚗𝚝𝚎𝚍 𝙵𝚘𝚞𝚗𝚝𝚊𝚒𝚗
creator: Syvil Wanless
